title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Tama, Black Maria, Unknown person #14, Law, Unknown person #15 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you face this girl while you speak, your voice will be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Pro- jected through the whole castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You do that and you'll be free to go

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: sevent between

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: These are Master Kaido's orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: What do you want with Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Let's see... first, we'll surround her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then, we'll break all of her limbs so she won't run away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But don't worry, we won't kill her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Not until we get what we want-)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You shouldn't underestimate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Nico Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Live Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I see them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I know where they are!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've found the Akazaya Nine!! Looks like they escaped the rooftop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They all have bloody Wounds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Looks like they're still breathing though!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They are behind the castle tower...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In the citadel's treasure room on the second floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: So they got away from Master Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got my hands full at the moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Isn't anyone else Avai- Lable?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Someone go to the treasure room immediately...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...and eliminate the Samura!!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Black Maria, did you hear that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: King, I'll go--o

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The treasure room on the second floor isn't far from here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And how many

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just need to finish off the Akazaya Nine, . . . . . . . . . . .

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kin' - Emon?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: were, they de; feated?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't you dare go near them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Be careful...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: ...I count ten people in the room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ten of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's dark, so I can't see clearly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Someone who is

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But someone's helping the Samurai!! Take them down quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's definitely somebody there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Break NextWeek

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Somebody else!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Who could it be?.?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 44 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
